message:
feat(web): Mobile and 3D viewer improvements

- Model3DView: Improved camera positioning, centering, and orbit controls
- SequenceView: Enhanced zoom controls and codon snapping toggle
- useSequenceGrid: Better zoom presets and pinch zoom support
- CanvasSequenceGridRenderer: Improved zoom level handling and rendering
- VirtualScroller: Enhanced scroll behavior with zoom support
- useOrientation: New hook for responsive orientation detection
- structure-loader: Improved model loading and caching

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
